name: Zoom
description: Zoom API enables AI agents to programmatically manage video meetings, webinars, users, and cloud recordings. Create, schedule, update, and retrieve meetings; manage participants and registrants; configure webinars; and access meeting recordings through a comprehensive REST API.

capabilities.name: meetings_list
capabilities.description: List all scheduled and live meetings for a user with pagination.

capabilities.name: meetings_create
capabilities.description: Create a new meeting with topic, schedule, duration, and settings.

capabilities.name: meetings_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific meeting.

capabilities.name: meetings_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing meeting's topic, schedule, and settings.

capabilities.name: meetings_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a scheduled meeting with optional cancellation notification.

capabilities.name: meetings_participants_list
capabilities.description: List participants who attended a past meeting instance.

capabilities.name: meetings_registrants_list
capabilities.description: List all registrants for a meeting with registration enabled.

capabilities.name: meetings_registrants_add
capabilities.description: Register a participant for a meeting that requires registration.

capabilities.name: meetings_registrants_update_status
capabilities.description: Approve, deny, or cancel registration for meeting registrants.

capabilities.name: meetings_polls_list
capabilities.description: List all polls configured for a meeting.

capabilities.name: meetings_poll_create
capabilities.description: Create a poll with questions and answers for a meeting.

capabilities.name: meetings_invitation_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the email-ready invitation text for a meeting.

capabilities.name: meetings_livestream_update
capabilities.description: Configure live streaming URL and key for a meeting.

capabilities.name: past_meetings_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a past meeting including participant count and duration.

capabilities.name: recordings_list
capabilities.description: List all cloud recordings for a user within a date range.

capabilities.name: recordings_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve all recording files and download URLs for a meeting.

capabilities.name: recordings_delete
capabilities.description: Delete or trash recording files for a meeting.

capabilities.name: recordings_recover
capabilities.description: Recover meeting recordings from trash.

capabilities.name: users_list
capabilities.description: List all users on the Zoom account with status filtering.

capabilities.name: users_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve detailed profile information for a specific user.

capabilities.name: users_create
capabilities.description: Create a new user on the Zoom account.

capabilities.name: users_update
capabilities.description: Update a user profile including name, type, and department.

capabilities.name: users_delete
capabilities.description: Delete or disassociate a user with optional data transfer.

capabilities.name: users_settings_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a user's meeting, recording, and feature settings.

capabilities.name: users_settings_update
capabilities.description: Update a user's meeting, recording, and notification settings.

capabilities.name: webinars_list
capabilities.description: List all webinars scheduled by a user.

capabilities.name: webinars_create
capabilities.description: Create a new webinar with topic, schedule, and settings.

capabilities.name: webinars_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific webinar.

capabilities.name: webinars_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing webinar's details and settings.

capabilities.name: webinars_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a scheduled webinar with optional cancellation notification.

capabilities.name: webinars_panelists_list
capabilities.description: List all panelists assigned to a webinar.

capabilities.name: webinars_registrants_list
capabilities.description: List all registrants for a webinar with status filtering.
